🔄 Contra Voucher For Cash ↔ Bank transfers only
ℹ️ A Contra Voucher is used when money moves between Cash and Bank accounts — e.g. depositing cash into bank, or withdrawing from bank. Journal entry: Dr To Account · Cr From Account

🔒 Lock Accounting Period Locked periods prevent any voucher from being created, edited, or deleted.
⚠️ Once a period is locked, no transactions can be posted or modified within that date range. Use this after completing a month-end or year-end closure. Only Admin users can lock/unlock periods.

🗄️ Data Backup & Restore

All your data is saved locally in this browser. Use Backup to download a .json file to your computer/folder. Use Restore to reload from a previously saved backup file.

📁 Current Company Backup
Last backup: Never
🏢 Full System Backup (All Companies)
Downloads a single file with all companies, users, and settings.

Unlimited
Real folder on device
📂 Device File — Save to Real Folder
Link a file on your phone or PC. Every time you save an entry, the data is automatically written to that file in real-time. You can see and copy this file in your file manager. Works on Chrome & Edge only.
Not linked to any device file
⚠️ File System Access requires Chrome or Edge browser. Not supported on Firefox or Safari.

🎯 Select What to Clear
⚠️
This will permanently delete all invoices, ledger entries, stock records, receipts, payments, journal entries, and GSTR data for the current company. This action cannot be undone. Download a backup first if you need to keep a copy.
Button activates only after typing CONFIRM above.
